name: com.dynamicdungeon.unity
description: Procedural 2D tile map generation using Cellular Automata, Perlin Noise, and Wave Function Collapse. Includes flood fill validation and A* pathfinding.

samples.description: 16x16 pixel-art tiles (Wall, Floor, Spawn, Exit, Enemy) with ready-to-use Tile assets. Import, then drag the .asset files from Tiles/ into the DungeonGeneratorComponent Inspector slots.
